title: stillingia lineata
intro: Stillingia lineata, also known as Queen's Root or King's Crown, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stillingia lineata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and wounds.
